reviews.review_msg: If every professor were like Steven I wouldn't mind spending my whole life in Uni. Gives great feedback, Cares about the students, Accessible outside the class, and funny. There is a lot of reading in the course which is expected as its a literature course. I would recommend everyone to take this course.

His class was fun and interesting, everyone enjoyed his class ;D tho there are lots of books and short stories to read, midterms and finals were not that hard if you listened in class and read the books. I would say he is the best prof in fic !!! 100/10

The best class I have ever taken and I hate essay writing. Every class felt like I was just hanging out with my cool uncle. He always has a fun story to tell. You need to do lots of reading (two short novels usually plus some short stories) but you can get by by just reading summaries as long as you understand the stories.

He is an amazing professor, I enjoyed every single class. If you have the opportunity you should definetly take his course. If you want a good grade you should read the books and stories before class so that you can participate more during the discussion. Amazing.

Steve is the best professor I've had in my life. You throw any topic at him; he can talk to you about it for hours; his lectures are so interesting, you'd bound to be interested. He is caring and has a lot of stories. Have fun in the class.

Steve is the most cool professor I have ever seen. He is flexible with the deadlines of the submissions, he is very familiar with the students and most importantly he is a very easy grader. You should know very basic english to get an above average grade.

Great professor, but the reading part is quite tedious. I read a few pages of the first book and got bored already. Fortunately you could totally get by reading only plot summaries and analysis. I only read 4 of the short stories in the form of audiobooks during commute and none of the longer books. Wouldn't take this if it's not a requirement tho.

He is a chill and nice person. However, books in this class are boring. He always marks papers by his own strange criteria. I got a B and my GPA went down so his class is not a GPA booster as you could think.
